textPlain: Highly recommended documentary Seeds of Time (2013) [0] on Dr. Cary Fowler at the FAO responsible for building the Spitsbergen/Svalbard Global Seed Vault [1][0] https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Seeds_of_Time_(film)[1] https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Svalbard_Global_Seed_Vault
Why do we build a valut ? Because we destroy the seeds. So why not spend time avoiding destroying the seeds ?
I'd also recommend reading up on the Vavilov collection in St. Petersburg: an incredible history.https://www.sciencehistory.org/stories/magazine/the-tragedy-...
